title: panicum khasianum
intro: Panicum khasianum, also known as the Indian rice grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Panicum khasianum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, among others. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
